title: Properties Inspector
text: Properties Inspector Use the Properties Inspector to view and edit the properties of the current object, or multiple objects. Depending on the object selected in the worksheet editor, the Properties Inspector may include the following tabs: Object —object properties that declare object behavior. Doc —comments, or instructions for using the object. For more information, see Documentation . Properties in the Object tab are categorized for easy navigation. You can click the category to collapse or expand its contents. Figure 1. Properties Inspector for a DSP Component How to Edit Object Properties Edit the Properties of Multiple Objects Sort Objects and Properties Resize Columns Related Links Define Entity Interface Use this form to define the Database Interface property of and entity, which defines its physical characteristics of in the database. Define Field Interface Specify the value of the Database Interface property of a field, which specifies how the field is stored. Define Field Syntax Define the field syntax definitions for a field, which determine the format required for data entered in the field. Define Field Layout Define layout definitions for the current field, which specify the way data appears when it is displayed in the field. . Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
